title_descriptor: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
page_title: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric - ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro - Ariteks
spec_line: 330 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
description_blocks: Antistatic 3/1S Twill Fabric 60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic twill fabric . ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 4 to 5.
ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic application, certified for EN ISO 1149.
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
330 g/m² , 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic 3/1S Twill Fabric

60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic twill fabric . ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters. It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 4 to 5. ArWoWear 330 Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification. Suitable for antistatic application, certified for EN ISO 1149. It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
